title: TKVM Health Warning
description: Immersive VFX & sounds at low health! (Made for FalchionMC)
body:
Any damage taken will increase the vignette strength on your screen.
As soon as you cross <5 hearts, a strong sound will play and a heartbeat will start to play

At <3 hearts, your vision will go grey and fog will start to set in, alongside ash particles. 

All VFX and SFX are configurable via YACL or in the config file.

# This mod is intended for my modpack, FalchionMC (In development...)
